title: Merging of cells duplicates the data in other merged cell instead of show text in one cell[BUG] XYZ
author: bkrajor19

comments.author: dinhhai96-vn
comments.body: It is working properly, you should merge before assigning value to it.

comments.author: LSL1618
comments.body: Try to fill in the value of the cell first，Then merge the cells.
